results.rendered_html:
dugha (von duh)
1〉 adj. (f. ā) am Ende eines comp. milchend, gewährend  P. 3,2,70 . gāṃ ca dharmadughām  BHĀG. P. 1,17,3 . dharmadughā bhūmiḥ sarvakāmadughā 4,19,7 . manonayanāhlādadughairgativihāravinayāvalokasusvarākṣarāvayavaiḥ 5,2,6 .
— 2〉 f. ā Milchkuh: indro valaṃ rakṣitāraṃ dughānāṃ vi cakarta  ṚV. 10,67,6 .  VĀLAKH. 2,3 .  VS. 28 . 16 . 39 . dharmārthadughā = vedasaṃhitā  BHĀG. P. 4,6,44 .
— Vgl. kāma˚, gharma˚, droṇa˚, bhāga˚, śukra˚, sabardu˚, su˚.

dugha a. (At the end of comp.)
(pb) Milking, yielding, granting, as in kāmadugha q. v.
— ghā A milch-cow.
